mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS todos ( todo_id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, content TEXT, done TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (user_id, title, content, done, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{done}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT todo_id as todoId, user_id as userId, title, content, done, created_at as createdAt FROM todos WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT todo_id as todoId, user_id as userId, title, content, done, created_at as createdAt FROM todos WHERE todo_id = #{todoId}
